activities.details: I levelled my Dungeoneering skill, I am now level 48.
I killed 3 boss monsters   called:  Lexicus Runewright , Har'Lakk the Riftsplitter and Stomp  in Daemonheim.
activities.text: I killed 3 boss monsters in Daemonheim.

activities.details: I have uncovered volume 12 of Daemonheim's history. I now have 7 volumes in total.
I levelled my Dungeoneering skill, I am now level 47.
I have breached floor 24 of Daemonheim for the first time.
I levelled my Dungeoneering skill, I am now level 47.
I have breached floor 23 of Daemonheim for the first time.
I levelled my Attack skill, I am now level 50.
I levelled my Prayer skill, I am now level 95.
I levelled my Prayer skill, I am now level 94.
I killed 3 Kalphite Queens.
I levelled my Constitution skill, I am now level 70.
I killed 2 Kalphite Queens.
I levelled my Necromancy skill, I am now level 72.
I tested myself against Hermod, the Spirit of War (and Rasial's phantom bodyguard). Despite winning, Rasial just regenerated Hermod. I have much left to learn.
activities.text: Quest complete: The Spirit of War

activities.details: I killed  A phantom born from the God Wars: Hermod, the Spirit of War.
activities.text: I killed  Hermod, the Spirit of War.

activities.details: I levelled my Necromancy skill, I am now level 71.
I levelled my Agility skill, I am now level 62.
I aided Azzanadra, my Mahjarrat ally, in rebuilding Senntisten Temple under Varrock Dig Site. He used the altar there to contact Zaros!
activities.text: Quest complete: The Temple at Senntisten

activities.details: Completing Hazeel Cult has given me enough Quest Points to pass the 90 QP milestone.
